examples: Some of his first interviews with the press were rather maladroit.
We knew that he had some problems somewhere from his maladroit movements.
Our new supervisor is clever in matters in which his predecessor was maladroit.
No matter that Mattis is maladroit, he is respected by fellow collectors, in part for having solved a vexing art world mystery.
In this one, a graduate student in art, Evelyn (Rachel Weisz), a fire-breathing free spirit, unaccountably takes up with an overweight and maladroit undergraduate, Adam (Paul Rudd).
